# Specs

<!-- Generated by seed-golden-context | Last updated: 2026-05-11 -->

This directory holds implementation-level specs for active or recently completed work in `contentful.net`.

## Naming Convention

```
YYYY-MM-<short-description>.md
```

Example: `2026-05-taxonomy-api-alignment.md`

## Spec Format

Each spec should include:
- **Status:** Draft / In Progress / Done
- **Context:** What problem is being solved
- **Proposed solution:** What will be built
- **Public API changes (if any)**
- **Test plan**

No specs exist yet — add one when starting a meaningful feature or change.
